title: dryopteris pteroides
intro: Dryopteris pteroides, also known as the Autumn fern, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its deciduous, pinnately divided fronds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Dryopteris pteroides include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, dried extract, or tincture, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
